# CTUnderlineStyle

**Structure**

Underline style specifiers.

## Declaration

```swift
struct CTUnderlineStyle
```

## Overview

You can apply these underline style specifiers to the value that you set with the [doc://com.apple.coretext/documentation/CoreText/kCTUnderlineStyleAttributeName] attribute. These specifiers control the underline style Core Text uses when rendering the text to which the attribute applies.

## Constants

- **single**: A specifier that indicates to draw an underline consisting of a single line.
- **thick**: A specifier that indicates to draw an underline consisting of a thick line.
- **double**: A specifier that indicates to draw an underline consisting of a double line.

## Initializers

- **init(rawValue:)**: Creates an underline style structure with the specified raw value.

## Constants

- **String Attribute Name Constants**: These constants represent string attribute names.
- **CTUnderlineStyleModifiers**: Underline style modifiers.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- ExpressibleByArrayLiteral
- OptionSet
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
- SetAlgebra
